tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or close to normal limits, indicating good glycemic control, preserved renal function, and balanced lipid profile. Mildly elevated chloride is noted but is likely of limited clinical significance in the absence of other electrolyte disturbances. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Overall, laboratory findings are unremarkable for this 84-year-old female patient.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
